title: dasymaschalon dasymaschalum var. wallichii
intro: Dasymaschalon dasymaschalum var. wallichii, also known as the Wallich's dasymaschalon, is a plant species of the Annonaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of the plant include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. The herbal preparations of Dasymaschalon dasymaschalum var. wallichii typically involve the use of its leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
